description:
**Milestone:** Knowledge Store Foundation

Add KnowledgeChunk, KnowledgeSearchResult, KnowledgeStoreStats, and KnowledgeStoreSettings types to libs/types/src/knowledge.ts and export from libs/types/src/index.ts. Implement KnowledgeStoreService in apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts using better-sqlite3. Schema: chunks table (id TEXT PK, source_type TEXT, source_file TEXT, project_path TEXT, chunk_index INT, heading TEXT, content TEXT, tags TEXT, importance REAL, created_at TEXT, updated_at TEXT) plus a FTS5 virtual table 'chunks_fts' that indexes heading+content. Methods: initialize(projectPath), getStats(), close(). The SQLite file lives at {projectPath}/.automaker/knowledge.db. Use WAL mode for concurrent read performance.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/types/src/knowledge.ts
- libs/types/src/index.ts
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] KnowledgeChunk, KnowledgeSearchResult, KnowledgeStoreStats types defined and exported from @automaker/types
- [ ] KnowledgeStoreService.initialize() creates knowledge.db with correct schema in .automaker/
- [ ] FTS5 virtual table created with heading+content columns
- [ ] WAL mode enabled
- [ ] npm run build:packages && npm run build:server passes with zero type errors

**Complexity:** medium
title: Types, Schema & KnowledgeStoreService
